scripts.test: NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH= npm run build:pages && EXPECTED_PAGES_BASE_PATH= npm run verify:pages && npm run verify:artifacts && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.verify:artifacts: node scripts/verify-learning-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/verify-experiment-contracts.mjs && node scripts/verify-research-course-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/tiny-gpt-reference.mjs --verify && node scripts/inference-benchmark-fixture.mjs --verify && node scripts/interpretability-intervention-fixture.mjs --verify && npm run verify:grades
